since_last: 71% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.29%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.37% · BTC +1.08% · Gold +0.09% · Nasdaq100 +0.96%. 71% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.29%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.29%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +5.73%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.73%, MRVL +5.68%, MDB +5.62%, TER +5.57%, MU +5.14%. Laggards: ORCL -2.83%, AAPL -2.72%, AI -2.10%, TSLA -1.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.10% at $124.11
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
